<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md before submitting.
Keep PRs small and focused — every changed line should trace to the change below.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / tooling

## How was this tested?

<!-- Device model, build/test commands run, manual steps. Quote key output. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `mise run build` and `mise run test` pass
- [ ] Tests added/updated where relevant
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Change is surgical — no unrelated reformatting or refactors
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
